queries.question: Show all the alliance airlines and also show the independent carriers but only with flights using the Airbus A320.
queries.sql:
SELECT Airlines.airline_name 
FROM Airlines JOIN Flights ON Airlines.id = Flights.airline_id
WHERE Airlines.type_of_alliance = "Airline Alliance" OR Airlines.type_of_alliance = "Independent Carrier" AND Flights.aircraft_model = "Airbus A320"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?airline_name WHERE {
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?airlines p:airline_name ?airline_name .
  ?airlines p:type_of_alliance ?type_of_alliance_w .
  ?airlines p:type_of_alliance ?type_of_alliance_w2 .
  ?flights p:aircraft_model ?aircraft_model_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_of_alliance_w) = "Airline Alliance" || (STR(?type_of_alliance_w2) = "Independent Carrier" && STR(?aircraft_model_w) = "Airbus A320")))
}

queries.question: Show all the flights using an Airbus A320 for airlines that are either with the alliance airlines or are independent carriers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Airlines.airline_name 
FROM Airlines JOIN Flights ON Airlines.id = Flights.airline_id
WHERE (Airlines.type_of_alliance = "Airline Alliance" OR Airlines.type_of_alliance = "Independent Carrier") AND Flights.aircraft_model = "Airbus A320"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?airline_name WHERE {
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?airlines p:airline_name ?airline_name .
  ?airlines p:type_of_alliance ?type_of_alliance_w .
  ?airlines p:type_of_alliance ?type_of_alliance_w2 .
  ?flights p:aircraft_model ?aircraft_model_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_of_alliance_w) = "Airline Alliance" || STR(?type_of_alliance_w2) = "Independent Carrier")) && STR(?aircraft_model_w) = "Airbus A320"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all alliance airlines and independent carriers with flights using the Airbus A320.
